turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan hello. Mujhe pata karna tha ki aap online payment accept karte hain ya nahi.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan ji, hum UPI, net banking aur debit/credit card sab accept karte hain — online aur clinic mein dono jagah.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Aur koi payment link bhej sakte hain mujhe? Bill abhi settle karna hai but main aa nahi sakta personally.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bilkul. Aapka patient ID ya invoice number batayein.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Theek hai. Aapke registered number pe payment link bhej deta hoon. 5 minute mein aa jaana chahiye. Amount hai 2,800 rupaye.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Perfect, link aa gaya toh kar dunga. Thank you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Aapka swagat hai. Koi dikkat ho toh call kar lena.
